claim_dispositions.basis: Matched disposable runs compare visible-test-only release with authority, identity, hidden-observation, receipt, residual, rollback, and quarantine gates.
The governed route reconciles observed candidate bytes and changed paths, reports residuals, and records exact or failed rollback instead of asserting success.
The run records tokens and wall time but does not establish production-scale cost, throughput, or transfer.

non_claims: This eight-task disposable corpus does not establish production transfer or open-world safety.
The independent observer is a separate local process and implementation identity, not an external institution or human reviewer.
The attack states are controlled injections, not prevalence estimates.
A favorable matched comparison does not validate the coder model generally.
